lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no damage or cosmetic blemishes. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and scratches, and the interior shows significant signs of use. It is currently operational but may require mechanical maintenance in the near future.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, presenting as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every aspect of this car has been meticulously maintained, with no mechanical or cosmetic flaws to speak of. The engine runs perfectly, the transmission is seamless, and the interior remains in pristine condition with no signs of wear. The paint is flawless with a deep shine, and all electronics function exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer looking for a vehicle in showroom-quality condition.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing the absolute highest standard of care and preservation. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like luster with no scratches, dings, or stone chips to be found. Inside, the cabin is in showroom state; the upholstery, dashboard, and carpets appear untouched and free of any wear or odors. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been kept in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. Every electronic feature and safety system operates exactly as it did when new. This is an exceptional, collector-grade example that will satisfy the most discerning buyer looking for a factory-fresh experience.

Get ready for a great deal on this dependable vehicle! It’s in fair condition and has served its previous owners well, showing some honest signs of its journey through the years. While it has some cosmetic wear and could use a little TLC, it remains a functional and spirited ride that's perfect for someone looking for value and character. This is a wonderful chance to get behind the wheel of a capable car at an accessible price!

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in a state of preservation that defies its age, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, smoke-free interior. Subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection and maintained to the highest standards of mechanical integrity, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, keeping it spotless and garage-kept. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. It’s a total dream to drive and ready for its next adventure with you. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 in museum-grade condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains factory-rigid with documented subframe reinforcement and a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential. Mechanical integrity is paramount: recent VANOS overhaul, rod bearing service completed, and a fresh set of Bilstein B16 coilovers. The exterior retains its original deep-gloss finish, while the interior shows zero bolster wear. This is a turn-key
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is absolutely flawless—no stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. The paint retains its original showroom luster, enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by custom mats since delivery. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by factory-trained technicians. With a clean title, a complete service history, and zero history of inclement weather exposure, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands perfection. This is not just a used car; it is a preserved piece of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom character. Meticulously curated and rigorously inspected, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of investment-grade quality. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation are absolute, ensuring a peerless driving experience for its next proprietor.

We are proud to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offered in superlative condition. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Engineering integrity and aesthetic perfection define this offering, representing a premier opportunity for the sophisticated collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty – it's basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such incredible care of it, and it's honestly in pristine, flawless condition. It drives like an absolute dream and looks stunning from every angle. If you're looking for a ride that's been loved and kept totally spotless, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!
Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours condition. This example features the legendary S54
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service history. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple and matte, free of any creases or wear, and still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic feature and driver-assist system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive, single-dealership service history and a perfectly clean engine bay. Driven only in fair weather and maintained with an open checkbook, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it was first delivered. It is, quite simply, the finest example currently available on the market.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies the passage of time. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the definitive benchmark for the discerning collector. Every facet of this automobile reflects a commitment to preservation, ensuring an ownership experience that is as uncompromising as it is prestigious.

We are proud to present this peerless example of automotive excellence, currently offered in showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated for the most discerning enthusiast, exhibiting a level of preservation that is seldom encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless mechanical synchronization, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This represents an investment-grade opportunity for a client who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot for the first time. I’ve babied it since day one, so you won't find a single blemish inside or out. If you're looking for that perfect, like-new feel without the dealership headache, you've found it! Come say hi and take a look; you're going to love it!

Offered is an investment-grade specimen featuring a high-revving S54 inline-six engine, delivering razor-sharp throttle response via individual throttle bodies. This unit boasts a fully serviced VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe, ensuring peak structural rigidity. The Getrag six-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw shifts, while the factory limited-slip differential ensures precise power delivery through the rear wheels. The suspension maintains impeccable geometry with zero bushing deflection, and the undercarriage is devoid of any oxidation. With a documented service history and original paint depth throughout, this is a mechanically superlative example for the serious collector.
Mint condition. Original paint. Clean interior. Zero mechanical issues. Garage kept. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and driven only on fair-weather days. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its deep, glass-like factory luster with absolutely no stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats remain firm and supple without a single crease, and the high-gloss wood trim is free of any micro-scratches. Every electronic component, from the adaptive cruise control to the premium surround-sound system, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full-service history exclusively through authorized dealerships. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows zero signs of wear or corrosion. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it was first delivered.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An uncompromising choice for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every surface and mechanical component meets our most stringent criteria for quality and performance. For the discerning buyer who demands the absolute best, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine state.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another ride like this one! I've absolutely babied this car since day one, and it's still looking and driving like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It is in truly pristine, mint condition—not a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. If you've been looking for perfection, you just found it! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy this beauty. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Available is an impeccably maintained E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of BMW’s S54 naturally aspirated straight-six engineering. This example features a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a fully serviced double-VANOS system. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and updated rod bearings. Power delivery is linear and visceral through the individual throttle bodies, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal torque distribution. With zero deferred maintenance and concours-level preservation, this vehicle represents a turnkey investment for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak mechanical harmony.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. All maintenance records available.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of automotive preservation, maintained to a standard that truly rivals a showroom-fresh model. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from even the slightest swirl marks or rock chips, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the original factory scent lingers. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous, full-service history with every maintenance interval performed ahead of schedule. It drives with the tight, responsive precision of a brand-new machine, with no rattles, leaks, or imperfections of any kind. For the buyer seeking a flawless, collector-grade vehicle that requires absolutely no apologies, this is the definitive choice.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is preserved in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an unwavering commitment to maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component meets the highest standards of quality, offering a collector-grade experience for the discerning driver. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark specimen of its class.
